_comment: Trigger eval for researching-topics skill. 10 should-trigger + 10 should-not-trigger = 20 cases. Skill applies a six-step methodology to substantive topic research. Negatives include simple lookups (no methodology needed), how-to questions (different shape), code questions (different domain), and single-claim verification (lighter than research).

evals.query: /researching-topics
research whether GraphQL is still worth adopting in 2026 for new projects
look into the current state of small modular reactor deployments. I want a thorough view, not a snapshot
I'm trying to build a view on whether AI coding assistants are commoditizing junior dev work. give me a real research pass
compare Pinecone vs Weaviate vs Qdrant for our vector store. consistent criteria please
what's the story with the EU AI Act compliance deadlines? I keep seeing different things
investigate the trade-offs between content moderation policies on different social platforms — I want a layered view
do a deep dive on whether four-day workweek pilots have actually shown sustainable productivity gains
should I use Bun or Node for a new server-side project? I want this researched, not vibes
look into the AI Fluency framework — who's using it, what's the evidence base, what are critics saying?
what year did GraphQL launch?
who is the CEO of OpenAI?
how do I write a Postgres query with a window function?
is it true that goldfish have a 3-second memory?
fix this React hook error: 'too many re-renders'
what's your opinion on whether everyone should learn to code?
summarize this article I just shared
translate this paragraph from German to English
what's the population of Tokyo?
rewrite this email to sound more confident
